decks.notes: The deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures that can be searched for and played at the right time to create powerful combos and synergies. Cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Walking Ballista are key pieces in this strategy, while cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Agatha's Soul Cauldron help find and play the necessary creatures. The deck also includes some graveyard recursion and utility cards like Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER and Grist, the Hunger Tide to provide additional value and versatility. Overall, the deck aims to create a toolbox of creatures to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents.

The deck focuses on utilizing the death's shadow mechanic to power up creatures quickly and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive tactics. By manipulating life totals and delving into the graveyard for additional resources, the deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong offensive presence. With a mix of efficient removal, disruption, and efficient threats, the deck seeks to apply pressure early and close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to generate mana and power up creatures, aiming to overwhelm opponents with a flurry of threats. By utilizing efficient cost reduction cards and powerful artifact synergies, the deck aims to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy that can put pressure on opponents early in the game. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke to control the board and protect its own strategy. Ultimately, the goal is to establish a dominant battlefield presence and close out games swiftly.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly flood the board with cheap creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear, and then use disruptive spells like Slickshot Show-Off and Lightning Bolt to control the opponent's board while pushing damage through. Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration provide card advantage, while Fiery Islet and Thundering Falls ensure smooth mana curve. The deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent, forcing them to react defensively while dealing damage consistently turn after turn.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Amulet Titan combo by utilizing cards like Primeval Titan, Amulet of Vigor, and Urza's Saga. By ramping up mana with Arboreal Grazer and lands that can tap for multiple mana, the deck can quickly search for key pieces and set up a game-winning Scapeshift or Green Sun's Zenith. The deck also includes utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Tolaria West to protect its combo pieces and ensure a smooth combo finish.

This deck aims to generate a large amount of mana through rituals and medallions, while using Ral, Monsoon Mage and other spells to draw cards and set up the combo pieces. The goal is to cast Past in Flames to recast rituals and other spells from the graveyard, leading to a high storm count to eventually finish off the opponent with a big Grapeshot or other direct damage spell. The deck also includes cards like Glimpse the Impossible and Wish to help find key combo pieces and ensure the deck can consistently go off.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage engines such as Narset, Parter of Veils and Teferi, Time Raveler. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually building up its own resources. The inclusion of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion adds an additional angle of attack to the deck. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a long game, eventually securing victory through card advantage and powerful finishers like Supreme Verdict and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria.

The main concept of this deck is to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy while utilizing the "blink" mechanic to maximize value from enter-the-battlefield effects of creatures. By constantly blinking creatures like Solitude and White Orchid Phantom with cards like Ephemerate and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to maintain board presence and disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck also includes a small control element with Teferi, Time Raveler and Consign to Memory to help deal with threats. Overall, the deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruptive tactics.

This deck utilizes a combination of creatures such as Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, along with powerful cards like Emrakul, the Promised End, to create a powerful synergy that can overwhelm opponents quickly. By combining creature removal with creature buffs and mana acceleration, this deck aims to establish board control and finish off opponents with a strong offensive push. With a focus on generating value through creature abilities and synergy, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through a coordinated assault.

The deck focuses on using powerful creatures like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, along with Writhing Chrysalis to generate a large number of tokens. These tokens can then be buffed with Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful army. Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista provide additional threats, while Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble can control the board. Urza's Saga helps find key cards and Boseiju, Who Endures protects crucial spells. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a large number of creatures and powerful combo interactions.

The deck focuses on assembling a toolbox of creatures that can be searched for and utilized to create a powerful combo finish. With cards like Devoted Druid and Vizier of Remedies generating infinite mana, players can quickly ramp into big threats like Craterhoof Behemoth or Walking Ballista to overwhelm their opponent. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble to control the board while setting up the combo. Tyvar, Jubilant Brawler provides additional value by generating tokens and pumping creatures, making it a versatile threat in the deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and the affinity mechanic to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble to recur artifacts and generate card advantage, the deck aims to control the board while maintaining a fast tempo. Cards like Metallic Rebuke and Cori-Steel Cutter provide disruption and removal, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler provide additional card draw and value. The deck's mana base allows for flexibility and consistency in casting spells across different colors.

The main concept of this Ruby Storm deck is to generate a lot of mana quickly with cards like Ruby Medallion, Desperate Ritual, and Manamorphose, in order to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot. The deck also utilizes cards like Past in Flames and Wish to recur spells from the graveyard or fetch key combo pieces. The goal is to create a storm of spells and burn spells to overwhelm the opponent and secure the win. Additionally, the inclusion of Valakut Awakening and Artists' Talent provides card advantage and selection to ensure consistency in the combo.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively deploying creatures and burning spells to deal damage to the opponent. It aims to control the board while maintaining pressure with low-cost threats and efficient removal spells. The key strategy is to continuously apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan, forcing them to react to the aggressive threats while advancing the game state with card draw and selection. The deck thrives on tempo and efficiency, aiming to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This UR Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents through a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. By controlling the board and key threats while generating card advantage with Snapcaster Mage and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, the deck aims to outlast opponents and win through efficient spellcasting. The deck also includes a variety of efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Flame of Anor, along with card filtering and selection tools like Subtlety and Prismari Charm to adapt to various situations. Additionally, the deck includes a toolbox of situational cards like Traumatic Critique and Sink into Stupor to handle a variety of threats.
